reminders.title: Take Naltrexone 50mg
reminders.description: Daily medication — do not skip even on the worst days.

reminders.title: Check on Mom — morning routine
reminders.description: Make sure Mom has taken Vitamin D, eaten breakfast, and Rosa has arrived or is on her way.

reminders.title: Log Mom's care notes
reminders.description: Record any episodes, meals, medication compliance, mood, and aide notes in Notion care log.

reminders.title: AA Meeting — Wednesday
reminders.description: St. Boniface Church, 1601 S. 9th St. 7:00 PM.

reminders.title: AA Meeting — Saturday
reminders.description: St. Boniface Church, 1601 S. 9th St. 9:00 AM.

reminders.title: Place Sysco order for the week
reminders.description: Review inventory levels, submit weekly Sysco order. Account SYSC-4412. Delivery Tue/Thu/Sat.

reminders.title: Process payroll
reminders.description: Run biweekly payroll through QuickBooks. Verify hours against Toast POS shift records.

reminders.title: Naltrexone prescription refill
reminders.description: Pick up refill from pharmacy. Prescribed by Dr. Martinez.

reminders.title: Review Comfort Keepers billing
reminders.description: Compare monthly invoice against agreed $1,800/month rate. Document any overcharges for Sandra.

reminders.title: Health inspection prep — deep clean
reminders.description: Full kitchen deep clean, walk-in temp logs current, HACCP binders updated. Inspection estimated mid-January.

reminders.title: Liquor license renewal
reminders.description: WI-MLW-2024-08841 renewal due July 2026. Start paperwork 60 days in advance.

reminders.title: Alvarez quinceañera — final menu confirmation
reminders.description: Confirm final menu, headcount, and dietary restrictions with Patricia Alvarez. Event March 22.

reminders.title: Lenten fish fry series begins
reminders.description: First Friday fish fry for St. Boniface contract. Verify cod supply with Sysco, prep stations, signage.

reminders.title: Send weekly P&L to Giancarlo
reminders.description: Email P&L summary to Giancarlo every Thursday morning before the 2 PM call.

reminders.title: Mom's Donepezil refill
reminders.description: Ensure Donepezil 10mg prescription is refilled. Mom takes it every evening.

reminders.title: Lock walk-in cooler temp log
reminders.description: Verify and sign off on walk-in cooler temperature readings before close.

reminders.title: Call Sandra — POA / billing update
reminders.description: Biweekly check-in with Sandra Milovich on Alejandro's POA threat and Comfort Keepers dispute progress.

reminders.title: Immigration audit — prepare documentation
reminders.description: Gather I-9 forms, verify all employee records. Consult Sandra on Luis Ochoa situation before audit date.
